title: Inventory Trash Cleaner
description: Cleans unwanted items from your inventory with a click of a button.
body:
Keep your hotbar ready and inventory clutter-free!

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/inventory-trash-cleaner?label=Modrinth+Downloads&color=04b54b) ![GitHub Downloads (all assets, all releases)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/itzispyder/inv-cleaner/total?label=GitHub+Downloads&color=blue)

📖 About

Ever had items you wanted to discard build up in your inventory over time? Dirt? Sand? Stone? Here's your solution!

***Disclaimers (2):*** - Since this mod works by sending inventory packets, servers may ban you for using it. Please check your server's rules before using this! - No keybinding will be added for this, you have to manually click the blue or red buttons (so this doesn't turn into a macro) This mod requires [**ImproperUI**](https://modrinth.com/mod/improperui) to run.

🛠️ Usage

| Action | Description | |:--------|:------------------------------------------| | Discard | Drops all selected items from inventory | | Keep | Drops all unselected items from inventory |

📷 Media



Thanks for downloading!
Like this mod? Support by dropping a follow or sharing this mod with a friend!
